query: vintage photograph with light leak streaks across edge film burn artifact lo-fi
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: light leak — film burn streaks, analog defects, motion-blur light trails, lo-fi authenticity

response.objective_caption: A grayscale image showing smooth, curved forms and diagonal bands of light against a dark background. Bright streaks arc from the upper right toward the lower left, crossing over expansive gray regions. Gradual tonal shifts move from near-white highlights through mid-gray to deep charcoal shadows, suggesting flowing material or atmospheric movement. A small text watermark appears in the lower right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph employing intentional blur and a muted, faded monochrome palette. Extreme soft focus or motion blur dissolves all fine detail into flowing, indistinct shapes, rendering the subject unrecognizable. Bright white streaks arc across crushed gray shadows in a desaturated, low-vibrancy composition that abandons representational clarity in favor of dreamlike gesture and ethereal atmosphere.
